summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reports module (Módulo de Reportes) for Svan ERP. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with Excel export capabilities.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) when containers load
design_issues.impact: Minor console warnings, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: All CRUD operations (productos, clientes, proveedores, ventas)
Frontend Reports page loading and navigation
Date filters functionality (fecha inicio/fin, tipo comprobante)
Charts rendering (pie chart for categories, bar chart for vendors)
Excel export buttons triggering downloads with proper filenames
Profitability data display with summary cards and product breakdown

success_percentage.integration: 100% (all Excel exports and data flow working)
